subject: FW: the company you keep
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: John Brockman [mailto:brockman@edge.org] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 19, 2008 5:01 PM
To: Jeffrey Epstein
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: the company you keep

Roger Highfield on Martin Nowak:

http://www.telegraph.co.uk/earth/main.jhtml?xml=/earth/2008/03/19/scipun
ish119.xml
"This study was supported by the John Templeton Foundation, the National
Science Foundation, the National Institutes of Health, the Jan Wallander
Foundation, and billionaire philanthropist Jeffrey Epstein."

Nowak "Nature" paper - attached



-- 
John Brockman

New York, NY 10022		     fax: 212.935.5535
